Use this outline when the change is mixed, cross-cutting, operational, or does not fit cleanly into a feature or bugfix bucket.

Suggested sections:
- Summary
- Context
- Change Details
- Operational Notes
- Validation
- Open Questions or Follow-up

Guidance:
- Use "Context" to explain why the change matters now.
- Use "Operational Notes" for deployment, configuration, support, or ownership details.
- Remove any section that would force speculation.
